name: Cottage Cheese, Eggs, and Bell Pepper
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 15-20 minutes

ingredients.item: bell peppers, cored, seeded, and sliced into rings

method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Arrange the bell pepper rings on the prepared baking sheet. Set aside.
In a medium mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, cottage cheese, salt, and pepper.
Add 1-2 tablespoons of the cottage cheese mixture to each bell pepper ring. Top each ring with the cheese.
